text.title: laravel-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for laravel-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Fat controller: validation inline, model creation inline, event dispatch inline, mail send inline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cannot be tested without HTTP, duplicates logic across endpoints, violates single responsibility.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generates one SELECT per user. Fix: User::with('organization')->get().

failure-mode.description: Empty $fillable with no $guarded — mass assignment on all columns.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Allows an attacker to set any column (e.g., is_admin) via a create/update request.
